narration: Your mental scratchpad is tiny — that's why phone numbers feel hard to keep.
visual_description: Hook visual: Your mental scratchpad is tiny — that's why phone numbers feel hard to keep.
ai_image_prompt: Hook visual: Your mental scratchpad is tiny — that's why phone numbers feel hard to keep.
ai_video_prompt: Cinematic motion: Hook visual: Your mental scratchpad is tiny — that's why phone numbers feel hard to keep.

narration: Working memory can only hold about 7 items at once, a limit set by cognitive psychologist George Miller.
visual_description: Context visual: Working memory can only hold about 7 items at once, a limit set by cognitive psychologist George Miller.
ai_image_prompt: Context visual: Working memory can only hold about 7 items at once, a limit set by cognitive psychologist George Miller.
ai_video_prompt: Cinematic motion: Context visual: Working memory can only hold about 7 items at once, a limit set by cognitive psychologist George Miller.

narration: So, why do we struggle remembering longer numbers? It’s all about chunking.
visual_description: Escalation visual: So, why do we struggle remembering longer numbers? It’s all about chunking.
ai_image_prompt: Escalation visual: So, why do we struggle remembering longer numbers? It’s all about chunking.
ai_video_prompt: Cinematic motion: Escalation visual: So, why do we struggle remembering longer numbers? It’s all about chunking.

narration: Chunking means grouping information into manageable bits, like 555-1234 instead of 5551234.
visual_description: Evidence visual: Chunking means grouping information into manageable bits, like 555-1234 instead of 5551234.
ai_image_prompt: Evidence visual: Chunking means grouping information into manageable bits, like 555-1234 instead of 5551234.
ai_video_prompt: Cinematic motion: Evidence visual: Chunking means grouping information into manageable bits, like 555-1234 instead of 5551234.

narration: But did you know? Cowan suggests we can hold even fewer when distractions hit.
visual_description: Pattern Interrupt visual: But did you know? Cowan suggests we can hold even fewer when distractions hit.
ai_image_prompt: Pattern Interrupt visual: But did you know? Cowan suggests we can hold even fewer when distractions hit.
ai_video_prompt: Cinematic motion: Pattern Interrupt visual: But did you know? Cowan suggests we can hold even fewer when distractions hit.

narration: Mastering chunking can boost your memory — whether for studying, phone numbers, or daily tasks.
visual_description: Payoff visual: Mastering chunking can boost your memory — whether for studying, phone numbers, or daily tasks.
